api_keys.title: AI Models & Connections
api_keys.description: Configure your connection to Cloud or Local AI providers.

data.local_api_url: Local API URL (Ollama or LM Studio)

data_description.api_key: If using Gemini, get a free key at aistudio.google.com.
data_description.local_api_url:
Ollama: http://YOUR_IP:11434/v1 
LM Studio: http://YOUR_IP:1234/v1 
(Must end in /v1)
data_description.local_api_key: Local servers do not require keys, but DO NOT leave this blank. Type 'ollama' or 'local'.
data_description.local_model: Ollama: Run 'ollama list' and copy the name exactly (e.g., llama3:8b).
